creator: jbeich@FreeBSD.org
text:
(In reply to hardy.schumacher from comment #0)
> 08:26:014 Common/MsgHandler.cpp:45 E[SYSTEM]: Warning: Failed to load ui_atlas.zim.
> 
> Place it in the directory "assets" under your PPSSPP directory.

I can't reproduce in 12.1 amd64 jail with (default) /quarterly package set. Check if /usr/local/share/ppsspp/assets exists.

Maybe try redownloading the package.
